text: Today, we're going to be performing a video-assisted thoracoscopic wedge resection followed by a lobectomy on a lady for evaluation with lung cancer.
When she was initially seen in a trauma evaluation in 2016, she was identified to have an abnormality within her lung.
This year, when we evaluated the right upper lobe lung nodule, it now measured 12 millimeters in size and was a solid lesion with speculated suspicious features.
She did not have a lot of other comorbidities.
